zh.Riccarton, Clackmananshire, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安利卡頓
zh.South Ayrshire, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭素斯 艾斯爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Adam Wallace - Laird of Riccarton and Kyle於1197年12月4日出生在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安利卡頓時，他的父親Sir Richard Wallace Laird of Riccarton25歲，母親Margaret de Buckingham21歲。他於1245年與Christine Kilbane在蘇格蘭艾斯爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1250年在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾艾爾享年53歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭艾斯爾艾爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adam Wallace - Laird of Riccarton and Kyle于1197年12月4日出生在英国苏格兰米德洛迪安利卡頓时，他的父亲Sir Richard Wallace Laird of Riccarton25岁，母亲Margaret de Buckingham21岁。他于1245年与Christine Kilbane在苏格兰艾斯爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1250年在英国苏格兰艾斯爾艾爾享年53岁，埋葬在苏格兰艾斯爾艾爾。

nameMeanings.name: Wallace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: variant of   Wallis  , especially in Scotland, where the name was introduced from the Welsh Marches by a family of tenants of the Stewarts in the 12th century.
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish (Ashkenazic) surnames, e.g.   Wallach  .

variants.name: Wallis
meanings: Scottish and English: from Anglo-Norman French Waleis, Walais ‘Welshman’, also sometimes ‘Breton’ (from Old English wēalas, walas, plural of walh, wealh, originally meaning a ‘Roman citizen’ and referring to the native British population, but in Old English this term later came to mean ‘serf, unfree person, foreigner’ or ‘Welshman’). In western and central England the medieval reference is clearly to Welshmen. In Norfolk and Lincolnshire, the reference was probably to Bretons, many of whom settled in the eastern counties after the Conquest. Compare Welsh , Walsh . The idea that the Scottish surname refers to the Welsh-speaking Britons of Strathclyde is erroneous.

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Adam Wallace - Laird of Riccarton and Kyle was born on 4 December 1197, in Riccarton, Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Richard Wallace Laird of Riccarton, was 25 and his mother, Margaret de Buckingham, was 21. He married Christine Kilbane in 1245, in Ayrshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1250, in Ayr, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 53, and was buried in Ayr, Ayrshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adam Wallace - Laird of Riccarton and Kyle est né le 4 décembre 1197, à Riccarton, Midlothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Richard Wallace Laird of Riccarton, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Buckingham, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Christine Kilbane en 1245, à Ayrshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1250, à Ayr, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Ayr, Ayrshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adam Wallace - Laird of Riccarton and Kyle am 4. Dezember 1197 in Riccarton, Midlothian, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Wallace Laird of Riccarton 25 und seine Mutter Margaret de Buckingham 21. Er hat 1245 in Ayrshire, Scotland Christine Kilbane geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1250 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Ayr, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Ayr, Ayrshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adam Wallace - Laird of Riccarton and Kyle è nato il il 4 dicembre 1197 nel Riccarton, Midlothian, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Richard Wallace Laird of Riccarton, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Buckingham, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Christine Kilbane nel 1245, nel Ayrshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1250, nel Ayr, Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Ayr, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Adam Wallace - Laird of Riccarton and Kyleが1197年12月4日にイギリススコットランドミドロスアンリクカートンで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Wallace Laird of Riccartonは25歳，母Margaret de Buckinghamは21歳であった。1245年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアでChristine Kilbaneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1250年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアエイルで53歳で死去し，スコットランドエイルシュアイアエイルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Adam Wallace - Laird of Riccarton and Kyle(이)가 1197년 12월 4일 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언 릭카턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Wallace Laird of Riccarton(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Buckingham(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1245년 스컷랜드 에이르실르에서 Christine Kilbane(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1250년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 에이르에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 에이르실르 에이르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adam Wallace - Laird of Riccarton and Kyle nasceu em 4 de dezembro de 1197, em Riccarton, Midlothian, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Richard Wallace Laird of Riccarton, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Buckingham, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Christine Kilbane em 1245, em Ayrshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1250, em Ayr, Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Ayr, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adam Wallace - Laird of Riccarton and Kyle родился 4 декабря 1197 г. в местности риккартон, мидлотян, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Wallace Laird of Riccarton было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Buckingham, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Christine Kilbane в 1245 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1250 г. в местности аир, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности аир, аиршир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adam Wallace - Laird of Riccarton and Kyle nació el 4 de diciembre de 1197, en Riccarton, Midlothian, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Richard Wallace Laird of Riccarton, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Margaret de Buckingham, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Christine Kilbane en 1245, en Ayrshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1250, en Ayr, Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Ayr, Ayrshire, Scotland.
